publishedAbstract: * OpenShift Data Foundation dashboard becomes unavailable after upgrading to OCP v4.10 * OpenShift Data Foundation dashboard gives `404: Page Not Found` after upgrading to OCP v4.10![ODF Dashboard](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/attachments/screenshot_from_2022-03-15_19-00-51.png)
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation dashboard becomes unavailable with Error 404: Page Not Found after upgrading to OCP v4.10
